summary: Classified two independent open maintainer-ready PRs. #88400 and #88401 are each useful, narrow contributor PRs for separate current-main bugs, but neither can be recommended for merge from this worker result because the required merge preflight is incomplete: no clean Codex /review is present, and the artifact still shows failed/stale CI shards. No combined fix artifact is emitted because the two repairs touch unrelated surfaces and a single cluster-scoped artifact would be over-broad.
